name: ren
description: Agentic OS: compounding memory, token discipline, governed autonomy

wikiRoot.title: Wiki location
wikiRoot.description: Where your personal wiki lives on disk. Default: ~/.renos/wiki. Used by every framework command that reads or writes the wiki (exported to skills as CLAUDE_PLUGIN_OPTION_WIKIROOT).

devRoot.title: Projects root directory
devRoot.description: Where your code projects live (e.g. ~/Dev, ~/code, ~/work). Used to resolve which project's L2 map a session belongs to. Default: ~/Dev.

snapshotRetain.title: Write snapshot retention
snapshotRetain.description: How many per-write wiki snapshots to keep at ~/.renos/wiki/.ren/snapshots/ before pruning. Higher = longer one-step-revert window; lower = less disk.
